title: Croatia men's national under-18 ice hockey team
summary: The Croatia men's national under-18 ice hockey team is the men's national under-18 ice hockey team of Croatia. The team is controlled by the Croatian Ice Hockey Federation, a member of the International Ice Hockey Federation. The team represents Croatia at the IIHF World U18 Championships.
text:
The Croatia men's national under-18 ice hockey team is the men's national under-18 ice hockey team of Croatia. The team is controlled by the Croatian Ice Hockey Federation, a member of the International Ice Hockey Federation. The team represents Croatia at the IIHF World U18 Championships.

International competitions
IIHF World U18 Championships
